title: WLC Mod
description: A complementary mod to go with the World's Longest Course (WLC) map/server! May be required for some gameplay features on WLC.
body:
# WLC Mod
## 📖 What is this mod?
This is a complementary mod to go with the World's Longest Course (WLC) map/server!

While you _aren't required_ to use this mod to drive on WLC, it is currently _required if_ you want to get OneBoat Completions while on the server. (And using the mod gives better quality of life, to be honest.) 

## 🔧 What does the mod do?

Currently, this mod only overcomes a few bugs regarding the respawn process on the WLC server.
However, more features may be added in the future, who knows?

---

### Example usage of the mod
![Player respawns with the mod, smoothly and clearly getting launched.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aea8bb8c099034708605e109159d95246b83031f.gif)


Your inputs automatically get locked during respawn procedures while playing WLC. Locking the inputs prevents a desync bug that would stop the boat in place (see next GIF).

---

### Desync bug (could otherwise occur when not using the mod)
![Player respawns but immediately gets stopped from the launch, due to desync bug.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/299e7e8831e5583916cd6587c4e71705872ebf5e.gif)


Without the mod, a desync can happen between the client and the server, *causing your velocity to get zeroed right after getting launched*, which is problematic in many ways:
1. It can lead to a buggy, bad experience for the player.
2. It can be exploited to save yourself from falling off the track.

---

### The alternative solution is sadge
![Player respawns, but an Inventory screen flashes right before being launched.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d84c2ff3c3285954606424dd0301c52aea5302d2.gif)


A different solution for players without the mod is to have an inventory (made transparent (albeit dark) with a resource pack) open up right before launching, in order to prevent players from inputting and causing the bug. However, 
1. This is not a perfect solution (there are still ways to get around it), and 
2. It looks terrible to have the inventory flash on screen, leading to a lower quality of life.

Therefore, I have decided to not respawn players with velocity if they do not have the mod. This means that it could be exploited to save a OneBoat Completion to simply pause and unpause your Run/MiniRun. Thus, OneBoat Completions *require* the mod to be installed.

---

## 🔰 What is World's Longest Course (WLC)?
World's Longest Course (WLC) is an ongoing project that I started back in _late 2021_ with the goal of making the **longest ice boat racing course of all time**. Its expansive road explores all kinds of different terrain and scenery, with trophies and other collectables to collect along the way!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZeB3MldnTQ0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A little showcase video of some of the World's Longest Course map.
